<!-- Generated by releases/scripts/generate-plugin-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->
Host-wrapped component exposed through the public interface SDK.
Prop list is derived from the public host contract because the SDK wrapper itself is untyped.

# Import

```ts
import { Button } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"default" | "destructive" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" | "link"` | Visual variant. |
| `size` | `"default" | "sm" | "lg" | "icon"` | Size preset. |
| `asChild` | `boolean` | Render through Radix `Slot`. |
| `className` | `string` | Extra classes. |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | Button body. |
| `onClick` | `function` | Click handler. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | Disable interaction. |
| `type` | `string` | Native button type. |

# Source

- Public host component exposed through `@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui`.
